title: DSE-1207 play Emiko Ejima Wants To Spoil Her Voluptuous Mother
overview: A father who slaps his son, who is a good age and doesn't have a regular job and is wandering around every day. Mother Emiko who believes in such a son's growth and watches over him warmly. My son happens to see me masturbating in the living room to relieve my mother's stress...!
